activities_projects.title: Understanding Federalism
steps: Write the definition of federalism
Identify two levels of government in India
Explain why power is divided between these levels
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the concept of power sharing in federalism

activities_projects.title: Levels of Government Chart
activities_projects.objective: Identify different tiers of government in India
steps: Draw a chart showing three levels of government
Label them as Union, State and Local government
Write one responsibility for each level
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognises the structure of Indian federalism

activities_projects.title: Union, State and Concurrent Lists
steps: Create three columns named Union List, State List and Concurrent List
Write at least three subjects under each list
Explain which government can make laws on each list
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands distribution of powers in the Constitution

activities_projects.title: Map Activity on Federal Countries
activities_projects.objective: Identify federal countries of the world
steps: Locate India on the world map
Mark two other federal countries such as USA and Australia
Label them clearly
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Identifies examples of federal systems globally

activities_projects.title: Unitary vs Federal Government
steps: Write the definition of unitary government
Write the definition of federal government
List two differences between them
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands differences between federal and unitary systems

activities_projects.title: Language Diversity Activity
steps: List five languages spoken in India
Identify the language spoken in your state
Explain why India does not have a single national language

activities_projects.title: Local Government Investigation
steps: Find the name of your village panchayat or municipal ward
Identify the local leader (Sarpanch or Councillor)
Write two functions of the local government
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognises the role of local government

activities_projects.title: Decentralisation Poster
steps: Write the meaning of decentralisation
Draw a diagram showing power moving from central to local levels
Add examples of local decision-making

activities_projects.title: Linguistic States Research
activities_projects.objective: Understand the formation of linguistic states
steps: Identify one state created based on language
Find the main language spoken there
Write why linguistic states were formed in India
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the concept of linguistic reorganisation

activities_projects.title: Panchayati Raj Structure
activities_projects.objective: Learn the structure of rural local government
steps: Write the three levels of Panchayati Raj
Explain the role of Gram Panchayat
Explain the role of Zilla Parishad
